posts.title: My American dream died long ago.

quotedTweet.content:
If you're wondering why so many US grads can't find career-starting tech jobs, you can watch multiple Indians explain how they got the jobs by "networking" with other Indian migrants who control access to the jobs.

twitter.content:
I remember making 6 figures in my mid 20s and being so excited for life and my family.

Then my own government and greedy investors destroyed my life and 10s of millions of others by choosing a corrupt system of cheap foreign IT STEM H-1B labor.

My American dream died long ago.
